theme_and_archetype.description: Editorial gallery aesthetic mixing High-Savoir Faire with cultural storytelling. Uses a museum-white base with deep, cinematic, high-contrast accents (Burgundy, Emerald, Champagne Gold) to evoke exclusivity and provenance.

headings.rules: Use for all H1, H2, and H3. Tracking should be tight (`tracking-tighter`). Emphasize italics for specific high-fashion words (e.g., 'Savoir-Faire').

body.rules: Use for body text, overlines, and UI labels. Clean, minimalist geometric sans-serif to contrast the heavy serif headings. Labels must be uppercase with wide tracking (`tracking-[0.2em]`).

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol Mode A (Tetris Grid) for B2C/Marketing. Mode B (Control Room) for B2B Sourcing Showroom.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_philosophy: Generous. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical. p-8, p-12, p-24 for section paddings. Let elements breathe like a museum exhibit.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid champagne or subtle grey. No soft drop shadows for B2B; use sharp borders to delineate data.

components.hero: Full-bleed or massive inset container. Must overlay a looping background video (simulated via high-res image placeholder with subtle scale animation if video fails). Overlay max bg-black/40. 'RASAA Manifesto' scrolling over it.
components.b2c_boutique: Cardless layout. Large images with text placed elegantly below or beside. Asymmetric grids.
components.b2b_showroom: Dense, precise UI. Shadcn forms heavily customized: sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), flat solid backgrounds, clear hierarchical borders.
components.pan_india_map: Interactive SVG with 'framer-motion'. Each state/cluster is a path. Hovering highlights the path in Champagne Gold and shows a tooltip of the artisan cluster.
components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for marketing, Solid Museum-White for B2B Dashboard.
components.footer: Dark section (bg-[#0F0A0A]) containing the Traceability Ledger. High contrast shift.

hero_video_fallback.description: Golden threads on a loom, cinematic macro shot (use as background with slow pan/scale)

b2c_jewelry.description: Pearl and diamond rings with gold accents

icons.rules: Use minimalist, thin-stroke icons to maintain the high-fashion editorial feel. Do not over-iconify; rely primarily on typography and whitespace.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. HYBRID ARCHITECTURE: The app requires a public marketing front (B2C + landing) and a gated B2B dashboard. Implement proper routing and Auth context.

2. LOGO: Create a bespoke text logo 'RASA LUXE' wrapped in an SVG or HTML block with a burgundy (#5D1A23) background and a stylized lotus icon (using lucide-react 'Flower2' or custom SVG path) if the actual image asset is missing.
3. TYPOGRAPHY: Import Bodoni Moda and Jost from Google Fonts in index.css. Apply them globally. Never use Inter for headings.
4. INTERACTIVE MAP: Use a pre-existing SVG path of India or an abstract representation. Use framer-motion to create hover states that reveal artisan clusters.

5. B2B ACCESS: Non-logged-in users trying to access B2B routes should see a beautifully designed 'Request Wholesale Access' form with deep burgundy branding. Authenticated users see the 'Material & Craft Library'.
6. TESTING: Every button, input, and significant interaction area MUST have a `data-testid` attribute.
7. BILINGUAL: Add a simple state toggle (EN/FR) in the header that changes key UI text elements.
8. TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the tailwind.config.js with the custom color palette provided above.
